t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Group Customer ID - cross-product identity key linking the same person across eToro products/entities. NULL for older accounts predating GCID introduction.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Global Customer ID — cross-platform identifier. Passthrough from BI_DB_Operations_Onboarding_Flow_UserKPIs. FK to Dim_Customer.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: "Group" changed to "Global", "cross-product identity key" changed to "cross-platform identifier", NULL semantics dropped, root origin Customer.CustomerStatic lost

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Full country name in English. Unique per country.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Customer's registered country name. Passthrough from BI_DB_Operations_Onboarding_Flow_UserKPIs.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Complete rewrite; "Unique per country" dropped, root origin Dictionary.Country lost

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Current regulation name for the customer (via Dim_Customer.RegulationID -> Dim_Regulation.Name). May differ from DesignatedRegulation if customer's regulation changed after registration.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Customer's current regulatory jurisdiction. Values: BVI, CySEC, FCA, ASIC, FSA Seychelles, eToroUS, FINRAONLY, etc. Passthrough from source.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Resolution path (Dim_Customer.RegulationID -> Dim_Regulation.Name) dropped, DesignatedRegulation diff note dropped, root origin Dictionary.Regulation lost

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Rejection reason text for the POA document. NULL if POA was approved or not submitted.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Raw Proof of Address rejection reason text from source. NULL if only POI was rejected. Used as input to ReasonNumber/RejectReasonName mapping.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: NULL semantics inverted: upstream says NULL when 'approved or not submitted', wiki says NULL when 'only POI was rejected' — different conditions

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Rejection reason text for the POI document. NULL if POI was approved or not submitted.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Raw Proof of Identity rejection reason text from source. NULL if only POA was rejected. Used as input to ReasonNumber/RejectReasonName mapping.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: NULL semantics inverted: upstream says NULL when 'approved or not submitted', wiki says NULL when 'only POA was rejected' — different conditions

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Reason why a VL2 customer has not reached VL3. CASE logic: 'Docs not Approved', 'Missing Docs', 'User Screening Issue', 'Phone Not Verified', 'Others', 'Not Relevant'. Only meaningful for VL2 customers.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Reason for non-verification. Always 'Docs not Approved' in this table (filter condition).
t1_fidelity_table.loss: All 6 CASE values dropped, 'Only meaningful for VL2 customers' note dropped

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Human-readable EV match status label (None, PartiallyVerified, Verified, NotVerified). Resolved via Dim_EvMatchStatus.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Electronic verification match status. Never 'Verified' (filter condition). 4 values: blank (64%), NotVerified (27%), PartiallyVerified (9%), None (<1%).
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Resolution source (Dim_EvMatchStatus) dropped, canonical value list replaced with filtered distribution

issues.column_or_section: ALL passthrough columns (GCID, CountryName, CurrentRegulation, RejectionReasonPOA, RejectionReasonPOI, NonVerificationReason, EV_MatchStatus)
issues.problem: All 7 passthrough columns tagged Tier 2 — SP_Failed_Verification_MA. Upstream wiki BI_DB_Operations_Onboarding_Flow_UserKPIs exists and was provided in the bundle. Per tier rules, all passthroughs with upstream wiki present must be Tier 1 with verbatim descriptions.

Tagged Tier 2 but upstream documents as Tier 1 — Customer.CustomerStatic. Description rewrites 'Group Customer ID' as 'Global Customer ID' and drops NULL semantics ('NULL for older accounts predating GCID introduction').

Tagged Tier 2 but upstream documents as Tier 1 — Dictionary.Country. Description is a complete rewrite: 'Full country name in English. Unique per country.' became 'Customer's registered country name.' Root origin Dictionary.Country lost.

Tagged Tier 2 but upstream documents as Tier 1 — Dictionary.Regulation. Resolution path (Dim_Customer.RegulationID -> Dim_Regulation.Name) and the important note 'May differ from DesignatedRegulation if customer's regulation changed after registration' both dropped.

NULL semantics inverted. Upstream: 'NULL if POI/POA was approved or not submitted'. Wiki: 'NULL if only POA/POI was rejected'. These describe different conditions — a reader would misunderstand when NULLs appear.
Tier legend only lists Tier 2 and Tier 5. Footer shows '0 T1' — should be 7 T1, 2 T2, 0 T3, 0 T4, 1 T5.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: Re-run with: (1) Re-tag all 7 passthrough columns (GCID, CountryName, CurrentRegulation, RejectionReasonPOA, RejectionReasonPOI, NonVerificationReason, EV_MatchStatus) as Tier 1 using VERBATIM descriptions from the upstream BI_DB_Operations_Onboarding_Flow_UserKPIs wiki. (2) For GCID use root origin Customer.CustomerStatic, for CountryName use Dictionary.Country, for CurrentRegulation use Dictionary.Regulation — these are the root origins declared in the upstream wiki. (3) Fix RejectionReasonPOA/POI NULL semantics: upstream says 'NULL if POA/POI was approved or not submitted', not 'NULL if only POI/POA was rejected'. (4) For NonVerificationReason, include the full CASE value list from upstream even though this table filters to one value. (5) Update Section 4 tier legend to include Tier 1 and fix footer tier counts to 7 T1, 2 T2, 0 T3, 0 T4, 1 T5. (6) Add concrete date context to Section 1.

table_level_stats_in_descriptions: EV_MatchStatus: distribution with percentages (blank 64%, NotVerified 27%, PartiallyVerified 9%, None <1%)
